title: Pearl Enters the Fight
description: On pages 5–8, Krieg’s forces push harder against the Baratie, using numbers, weapons, and intimidation while Sanji and the cooks struggle to hold the line.
scene: The restaurant becomes a battlefield where Krieg’s idea of strength clashes with the Baratie’s pride and the Straw Hats’ refusal to yield.

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Our ship's gonna catch on fire!

dialogue.speaker: Pearl
dialogue.text: with my flame shield, my iron wall is now even more invincible!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Is he trying to burn down the very ship we're trying to steal into cINDERS!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Shit! Fire in the front and the ocean to the back!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: We've got no place to run to!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Hot!!! I can't take it anymore!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Can't get near me, can you!?

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Sanji, you dumbass! You'll get burnt to a crisp!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Don't you dare burn this restaurant down!

summary: This part keeps increasing the pressure on the Baratie and exposes the brutality of Krieg’s command structure.
